## What this changes

One paragraph. If it adds an RFC, the RFC's summary section belongs here too.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] This change is consistent with the decision records in docs/decisions, or it explicitly argues with one and says so
- [ ] Documents touched still read as one voice — terminology matches the glossary of the files around it

## CLA

First contribution? Include the sign-off from CLA.md here.
